caption: Issue #863: the form-up click-and-drag line now spans the regiment's REAL formed-up width, loose-order spacing included. A lone LOOSE Archers regiment is deployed with an RMB drag: the preview line under the cursor (and its file-count label) matches where the flank files will actually stand -- before this fix it drew at half the real width, and in multi-unit drags the density-blind slice layout could deploy overlapping blocks. The regiment reshapes 9 -> 14 files and marches onto the drawn line, landing exactly spanning it. The flank-grip resize preview got the same fix (see the still in the PR description).
